name: Shattered Legions
lore: Engineered superhuman warriors designed by the Shattered King himself, the Legions follow in His footsteps to rid the universe of the threats it contains, and seek a permanent end to the Cataclysm.

rules.name: Vow of Eternity
rules.lore: The Shattered Legions, in their service to the King and eachother, swear oaths before and during battle to accomplish their goals.
rules.text: At the start of the Battle Round, select one enemy unit. Until the end of the Battle Round, your +Shattered Legions+ units may reroll failed Hit rolls for attacks made against that target.
